reportedIssues: The 'Cop the Lot Megaways' game card displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is nonsensical for a jackpot amount and likely indicates a data or rendering bug.

Game cards on the right side of both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off mid-content (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNG MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'), making them appear broken and unreadable.
The navigation tab bar at the top clips the last visible item to 'Hot Ga' instead of showing the full label (likely 'Hot Games'), indicating an overflow issue without a scroll affordance.
The partially visible game cards on the right edge have no visual affordance (such as a gradient fade or scroll arrow) to indicate that the content is scrollable, which may confuse users.

expected.reasoning: Issue 0 directly describes the 'Cop the Lot Megaways' game card displaying a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is the exact defect of a negative jackpot value.
